They then place a house-shaped wooden sign labeled 'A MERMAID LIVES HERE' onto the vinyl and trace its outline with a blue pen. After cutting the vinyl to match the sign’s shape, the Hands carefully apply it to the wooden sign, smoothing it down and trimming the excess. Next, the Hands use a foam brush to apply a dark brown wood finish to several light-colored wooden blocks, staining them to achieve a warm, antique brown hue. The stained blocks are then assembled into a cross-shaped base using Titebond Quick & Thick Multi-Surface Glue. The entire process takes place on the clean, bright white marble surface, emphasizing the crafting steps with clear visibility of each tool and material.
